what_it_does: Records a channel-memory attachment entry that links the design-source channel to an image target via a typed reference and timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
conventions: References assets with a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: No title, caption, or description for the attachment
Target URI cannot be verified from this file alone
No indication of file format or dimensions
notes: This is a minimal, timestamped image-attachment metadata record for a design-source pitch asset.
questions: What visual content does image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-03 contain?
Who added this attachment and why?
Does the referenced image actually exist and is it current?
How does this attachment relate to pitch p-03 or other attachments?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — no explicit stated purpose field; the content is consistent with an attachment metadata record.
intention_signals: Catalog an image attachment associated with the design-source channel's recent pitches so it can be referenced, retrieved, or fused later.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel and an image asset, which a fused system would retain as a provenance and attachment reference.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-20153c83 in the design-source channel links to image target image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-03 with attachment type images and a 2026-06-22 UTC added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Record an image attachment for the design-source channel so the pitch image can be referenced or retrieved later.
